CustomField.description: Used in quote templates to display the respective quantities with expression of days/hours/pieces.
CustomField.formula: IF(Quantity = 1 && ISPICKVAL(Fraction__c,"Days"), TEXT(Quantity) & " Tag", IF(Quantity = 1 && ISPICKVAL(Fraction__c,"Hours"), TEXT(Quantity) & " Stunde", IF(Quantity = 1 && ISPICKVAL(Fraction__c,"Pieces"), TEXT(Quantity) & " Stück", IF(Quantity > 1 && ISPICKVAL(Fraction__c,"Days"), TEXT(Quantity) & " Täge", IF(Quantity > 1 && ISPICKVAL(Fraction__c,"Hours"), TEXT(Quantity) & " Stunden", IF(Quantity > 1 && ISPICKVAL(Fraction__c,"Pieces"), TEXT(Quantity) & " Stücke", null ))))))
CustomField.label: Quantity
